q: An Alvarado score of 8 would suggest:
correct: High probability of appendicitis — surgical exploration indicated
choices: High probability of appendicitis — surgical exploration indicated

q: Pain in the RLQ elicited by passive extension of the right hip — with the patient lying on their left side — is called:
What are the three borders of Hesselbach's triangle?
correct: Rectus sheath (medial), inguinal ligament (inferior), inferior epigastric vessels (lateral)
choices: Rectus sheath (medial), inguinal ligament (inferior), inferior epigastric vessels (lateral)
Medial umbilical ligament, lateral umbilical ligament, inguinal ligament
Spermatic cord, vas deferens, testicular vessels
